title: taraxacum horizontale
intro: Taraxacum horizontale, also known as a variant of the dandelion, is a perennial plant species within the genus Taraxacum. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum horizontale lie in its roots, leaves, and flowers, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of consuming Taraxacum horizontale include supporting liver and kidney function, reducing blood pressure, and alleviating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum horizontale can be made into teas, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
